raw_consumer_statement: I am a merchant who sent an invoice to one of my customers. They lied and said they didn't receive the merchandise when they indeed have the merchandise in their possession. I don't like it when consumers lie and this has completely over drafted my account and messed it up. I am livid with the way this has been handled. I have provided all evidence and proof that he received the merchandise even before that payment was done. He made a partial payment and was still owed the {$500.00} on the balance.
